conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
Great! So, what's been going on in your daily routine lately? Any new habits or changes you've noticed?
Nah, nothing too out of the ordinary. Just the usual graphic design stuff and taking care of my cat, Lola.
That sounds lovely! How about your work life? Any stressors or challenges that come to mind?
Honestly, yeah. Been struggling to keep up with projects and meeting deadlines. My boss is always on my case.
I see. It sounds like you're feeling a bit overwhelmed. Have you been able to take any breaks or self-care time recently?
Ha! Breaks? What are those? No, seriously, it's been tough to find the energy for anything outside of work and Lola.
I understand. Energy can be hard to come by when we're feeling stressed. How have you been sleeping lately?
Honestly, not great. I've been waking up multiple times a night, thinking about work stuff.
That must be frustrating. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or eating habits?
Yeah, a bit. I mean, I'm not really craving food like I used to. When I do eat, it's just kind of... bland.
Okay. It sounds like you're experiencing some physical symptoms related to stress. Can you tell me more about your mood lately? Are there any emotions that have been standing out to you?
Yeah, guilt. A lot of guilt. Feeling like I'm not doing enough or good enough in my work or life.
I hear you. Guilt can be a heavy burden. What do you think is causing this sense of guilt?
I don't know... just feeling like I should be doing better, I guess. Like everyone else is more together than me.
Okay. It sounds like there might be some comparison going on. Can you help me understand what that's like for you? How does it feel when you compare yourself to others?
Ugh... it just feels like a constant struggle, you know? Like I'm never good enough or worthy enough.
That must be really tough. Have you been avoiding any activities or hobbies lately because of this feeling?
Yeah... pretty much everything, actually. It's like my motivation has just vanished.
Okay. So it sounds like you're experiencing a loss of energy and motivation due to guilt and comparison. Is that right?
Yeah, yeah, something like that. Just feels like I'm stuck in this rut.

I see. Well, we can definitely work on shifting some gears here. Let's start by exploring some ways you might be able to take small steps towards changing your daily routine and prioritizing self-care.
Yeah... okay, that sounds good.
Great! So what do you think is the most important thing for us to focus on in this session? Is there anything specific that's been bothering you?
Honestly, just trying to get some sleep and wake up feeling like I'm not a complete failure. That'd be nice.
Well, we can definitely work on improving your sleep habits and reducing stress. What do you think would be the most important step for you in terms of changing your daily routine?
I don't know... maybe just taking a few minutes each morning to breathe or something? You know, calm down.
That's a great idea! Taking short breaks throughout the day can really help reduce stress. Let's make that one of our goals for this week. What do you think about giving it a try?
Yeah... okay, sounds good.
Great! We'll work on setting up some small changes like that and see how they impact your daily routine and overall well-being. Anything else come to mind before we wrap up today's session?
No, not really. Just the usual stuff – trying to get my life together. *laughs*
Well, we're definitely going to work on that! It was great chatting with you today. We'll pick back up next time and see how those small changes are impacting your daily routine.
Yeah, sounds good. Thanks for listening.
Of course – it's all part of the service!
